overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet asphalt streets, and Japanese-inspired architecture. The player character moves through an intersection, passes under a concrete overpass and through a red neon torii gate, continues along a green bike lane, and turns into a narrow alleyway. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with characteristic teal and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with neon signage

events.description: camera pans left and begins walking forward toward the concrete overpass
black sedan with headlights on drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection, turning left to face the red neon gate structure ahead

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car with red taillights driving past the camera
black sedan with bright headlights approaching the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete support structure with metal scaffolding and industrial details
traditional Japanese-style gate with bright red neon lighting and teal accents
tall buildings with colorful vertical neon signs and holographic displays
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera turning left to walk toward a prominent red neon torii gate. A white futuristic car passes by on the right, followed by a black sedan crossing the intersection. The scene is dominated by towering neon-lit skyscrapers and a massive concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with dedicated green bike lane and commercial storefronts

events.description: passing the red neon gate and entering the main street corridor with green bike lane
red taillights of distant cars visible ahead on the wet road surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green bike lane sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: painted green pedestrian and bike path with large red walking figure symbols
tall modern street light casting bright white illumination on the sidewalk
lit shop windows with various neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having passed the red gate, the camera moves along a street featuring a distinctive green bike lane with red pedestrian markings. The street is lined with parked cars on the left and illuminated storefronts on the right, while neon skyscrapers loom in the background. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic billboards approaching intersection

events.description: slowing slightly as approaching the Columbus street intersection
large commercial truck passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various neon signs and advertisements, approaching the Columbus intersection

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck driving past on the road

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Columbus mounted on a pole
large glowing advertisement display showing animated content and bright colors
white and red striped barriers blocking part of the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the green bike lane, passing more storefronts with neon signage. A large holographic billboard glows on the right as the camera approaches the Columbus street intersection. A commercial truck passes by on the left, and construction barriers are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and alley entrance

events.description: turning right at the Columbus street corner toward the alley entrance
pedestrian walks past the camera from right to left temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection, crossing the street toward the narrow alley entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark pants walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: narrow dark opening between concrete buildings leading to a back alley
graffiti-covered building wall with barred windows and industrial details

segments.scene_description: At the Columbus intersection, the camera turns right, leaving the green bike lane behind. A pedestrian crosses in front of the camera as it approaches a narrow, dark alley entrance between concrete buildings. The scene transitions from the open street to the confined alley space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti and urban debris

events.description: entering darker area of the alley with significantly less neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow alleyway between tall buildings, passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in red tank top walking toward the camera from the alley depths

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in purple and white graffiti tags and street art
green industrial dumpster against the wall with trash bags nearby
trash, cardboard, and discarded items littering the alley floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow, enclosed alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. The lighting shifts to low-light conditions with only distant neon glow visible. A pedestrian in a red tank top approaches from the opposite direction as the camera moves deeper into the alley past trash dumpsters and barred windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched city intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a dark urban alley. It begins at a bustling crossroads beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past a white futuristic car and a black sedan toward a prominent red neon torii gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment shifts to a wet asphalt street where the camera glides along a green bike lane lined with glowing storefronts and towering skyscrapers. The scene then expands past a large holographic billboard and a passing commercial truck before turning right at the Columbus intersection, leaving the open road behind. Finally, the perspective transitions from the bright city lights into a narrow, enclosed alleyway filled with graffiti and debris, where the lighting dims as the camera moves past trash dumpsters toward a pedestrian in a red tank top.
